sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】YieldMax JPMO ETF公告配息0.0567美元，鎖定1月23日發放日
feed.summary: |YieldMax JPM Option Income Strategy ETF (JPMO) 宣布將進行每週配息，每股配息金額為0.0567美元。此次配息的除息日與股東名冊登錄日均為1月22日，符合資格的投資人將於1月23日收到現金股利。JPMO是一檔運用期權策略連結摩根大通，旨在產生收益並提供高頻率現金流的ETF。

feed.title: Laureate Education stock hits all-time high at 36.35 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Laureate Education stock reached an all-time high of $36.35, indicating strong investor confidence with a 74.45% total return over the past year. Despite a slight miss on Q4 2025 EPS, the education company exceeded revenue forecasts, driven by strategic initiatives. Analysts maintain an optimistic outlook with a high price target of $43, suggesting potential for further growth.

feed.title: 24 Merrill Advisors Recognized on Financial Planning's Top 40 Brokers Under 40 List
feed.summary: Financial Planning has recognized 24 Merrill Wealth Management and Merrill Private Wealth Advisors on its annual Top 40 Brokers Under 40 list. This marks the seventh consecutive year Merrill has had the most advisors on the list, highlighting the firm's strong talent and commitment to advisor development. The rankings are based on production totals and AUM verified by employers.

feed.title: CMS Energy Announces Diane Leopold and Richard Keyes to Join the Board of Directors
feed.summary: CMS Energy announced the election of Diane Leopold and Richard Keyes to its boards of directors, effective February 20, 2026. Leopold, a retired executive vice president and chief operating officer at Dominion Energy, brings over three decades of utility experience and will serve on the Compensation and Human Resources and Finance Committees. Keyes, president and chief executive officer of Meijer, Inc., brings over 35 years of business experience and will serve on the Audit Committee and Governance, Sustainability and Public Responsibility Committee.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Invitation Homes Price Target to $31 From $33, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for Invitation Homes (INVH) to $31 from $33, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This update follows a series of recent analyst adjustments for the residential REIT, including price target changes from KeyBanc and RBC. The stock is currently trading at $25.68, down 4.32%.

feed.title: Is Modine Stock Still Worth Buying After a 63% YTD Rally?
feed.summary: Modine Manufacturing (MOD) has seen a 63% year-to-date rally, driven by strong earnings momentum and its role in data center cooling. The company is benefiting from AI and cloud infrastructure growth, with management expecting significant annual revenue growth in data center sales and improving margins. Modine's planned spin-off of its Performance Technologies business aims to further sharpen its focus on high-growth Climate Solutions.

feed.title: Dominion utility veteran and Meijer CEO join CMS Energy boards
feed.summary: CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) has elected Diane Leopold and Richard Keyes to its and Consumers Energy's boards of directors, effective February 20, 2026. Leopold, a retired executive from Dominion Energy, brings over three decades of utility operations experience, while Keyes, the current CEO of Meijer, adds over 35 years of retail and operational leadership. They have been assigned to key committees, strengthening the boards with diverse and extensive expertise.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Prologis Price Target to $157 From $146, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Prologis (PLD) to $157 from $146, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst activities, including Goldman Sachs and RBC also raising their price targets for the commercial REIT. Prologis, a global leader in industrial distribution real estate, has also announced an increase in its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Mendel Money Management Cuts Stock Position in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Mendel Money Management significantly reduced its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) by 40.9% in the third quarter, selling 11,341 shares and retaining 16,366 shares valued at $2.30 million. Despite this, other institutions like Norges Bank, Laurel Wealth Advisors LLC, and Charles Schwab Investment Management Inc. increased their holdings. PepsiCo recently approved a $10.0 billion share repurchase plan and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.4225, with analysts holding a "Hold" consensus rating and an average target price of $167.83 for the stock.

feed.title: Needham Adjusts Price Target on Axon Enterprise to $600 From $870, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Needham has lowered its price target for Axon Enterprise (AXON) from $870 to $600 but has maintained a Buy rating on the stock. Axon Enterprise specializes in public safety technology, including TASER weapons, body cameras, and integrated software solutions. The company's net sales are primarily derived from sensors and embedded software (60.7%) and electric pulse guns (39.3%), with the majority of its sales in the United States.

feed.title: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ Has $6.12 Million Stock Holdings in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. $ZBH
feed.summary: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ significantly increased its stake in Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (ZBH) by 47.5%, now holding 62,079 shares valued at $6.12 million. This move follows Zimmer Biomet exceeding Q3 earnings expectations and providing strong FY2026 guidance. The stock currently carries a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $106.20, despite mixed analyst actions including downgrades and upgrades.

feed.title: DECK Upgraded to Buy by Argus Research | DECK Stock News
feed.summary: Argus Research has upgraded Deckers Outdoor (DECK) from a Hold to a Buy rating, reflecting a more optimistic outlook. This upgrade follows several other analysts who have recently raised their price targets and maintained positive ratings for DECK. The consensus among 21 analysts for DECK's one-year price target is $128.35, implying an 8.71% upside from its current price, with an overall "Outperform" brokerage recommendation.

feed.title: Mendel Money Management Has $426,000 Stock Holdings in Crown Castle Inc. $CCI
feed.summary: Mendel Money Management significantly reduced its stake in Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) by 73.1% in the third quarter, now holding 4,420 shares valued at approximately $426,000. Despite this reduction, institutional investors collectively own 90.77% of Crown Castle, with some firms increasing their positions while others trimmed theirs. Analysts currently rate Crown Castle as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $100.02, reflecting recent downgrades.

feed.title: Analyst Jason Kolbert Maintains Buy Rating for Pulmonx (LUNG) at $14 Target | LUNG Stock News
feed.summary: D. Boral Capital analyst Jason Kolbert has reaffirmed a Buy rating for Pulmonx (LUNG) with an unchanged price target of $14.00 USD. This decision reflects continued confidence in the medical technology company, which specializes in minimally invasive treatments for severe emphysema. Other analysts have made varying adjustments to their ratings and price targets over the past few months, with the average target price from six analysts currently at $5.75, suggesting a significant upside from its current price.

feed.title: Kosmos rises as Ghana's parliament ratifies extensions for key offshore petroleum licenses
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy (KOS) saw a pre-market rise after Ghana's parliament ratified extensions for its offshore petroleum licenses for the Jubilee and TEN fields until 2040. This approval is anticipated to unlock up to $2 billion in additional capital spending for the company.

feed.title: MFA: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Raises Price Target to $11.00 on Market Perform Rating | MFA Stock News
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods analyst Bose George has increased the price target for MFA Financial (MFA) from $10.00 to $11.00, while maintaining a "Market Perform" rating. This adjustment comes amidst a series of diverse analyst ratings over recent months for the specialty finance company, which invests in residential mortgage assets. The average target price from four analysts is $10.69, suggesting a 6.34% upside from MFA's current price of $10.05.

feed.title: News | RTX's Collins Aerospace autonomy solution, Sidekick, flies GA-ASI's YFQ-42A CCA platform
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, successfully tested its Sidekick mission autonomy software on a YFQ-42A uncrewed jet developed by General Atomics Aeronautical Systems for the U.S. Air Force’s Collaborative Combat Aircraft (CCA) program. The test involved a four-hour autonomous flight, managed by a human operator, showcasing seamless integration and precise piloting commands. This achievement is a significant step forward for the CCA program, demonstrating the adaptability of Collins’ open systems approach and nearly a decade of investment in collaborative mission autonomy.

feed.title: New Sherwin-Williams in LaGrange celebrates grand opening
feed.summary: A new Sherwin-Williams store on Greenville Road in LaGrange, Georgia, celebrated its grand opening with a ribbon-cutting ceremony. The store, which officially opened on September 29, aims to serve the growing community, particularly targeting do-it-yourself customers, while its existing location continues to focus on contractors. Manager Quran Hodges emphasized the store's dedication to customer service in helping residents with their home color selection.

feed.title: Travelers Loses Ohio Asbestos Occurrence Ruling
feed.summary: An Ohio appellate court ruled against Travelers in a $6 million coverage dispute with Copeland Corporation regarding asbestos claims. The court determined that Ohio law governs the policies and that each individual asbestos exposure constitutes a separate occurrence, rather than a single event as argued by Travelers. This decision significantly increases Copeland's potential coverage from $3 million to up to $9 million across three policies.

feed.title: 7 Days: Your guide to Las Vegas (Feb. 22-28)
feed.summary: This article provides a day-by-day guide to activities and dining in Las Vegas from February 22-28, 2026. It highlights attractions such as Mama Rabbit for National Margarita Day, The Range 702, Saginaw’s Delicatessen, Shark Reef Aquarium, Edge Steakhouse, a Jim Jefferies performance, and Omega Mart. The guide offers a diverse range of experiences for visitors to the city.

feed.title: Jakks Pacific Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend to Shareholders
feed.summary: Jakks Pacific (JAKK) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share, to be paid on March 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 27, 2026. This move signals the company's confidence in its financial health and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. While an analyst rating on JAKK stock is a Hold with a price target of $19.00, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates JAKK as Neutral, citing declining financial performance and challenging market conditions despite a strong balance sheet and attractive dividend yield.

feed.title: How CVS Health test-drives better care experiences using generative agents
feed.summary: CVS Health is leveraging generative agent simulations to test and refine customer care experiences, using AI-driven "agentic twins" modeled on real patient data. This technology allows them to understand various populations' responses to services and messages, uncover friction points, and prioritize effective interventions more quickly than traditional research. The goal is to design simpler, more intuitive care journeys and improve health outcomes by understanding patient motivations.

feed.title: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE:TRGP) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. reported an exceptional year in 2025 with record volumes and financial performance, achieving $4.96 billion in adjusted EBITDA. The company anticipates continued growth in 2026, driven by Permian expansions and new infrastructure projects, including two new processing plants and a 13th fractionator. Targa projects significant free cash flow generation post-2027 following the completion of major downstream projects like Speedway, aiming for over $6 billion in run-rate adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) reported record financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, with revenues reaching $28.5 billion and adjusted EPS growing 20% to $10.75. The company sees significant momentum in its end markets, driven by infrastructure investment, load growth, and data center demand, resulting in a record backlog of $44 billion. Quanta is strategically investing in vertical supply chain solutions, including power transformer manufacturing, and expects continued double-digit growth and over 20% adjusted EPS growth in 2026.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE:LYV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting an EPS miss but outlining confidence in double-digit AOI growth for 2026, driven by strong sponsorship and concert sector performance. The company addressed the DOJ lawsuit, viewing recent dismissals as positive for preventing a company breakup, and discussed initiatives to combat secondary market ticket behavior and future growth for its Venue Nation segment, particularly in international markets.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, revealing a miss on EPS expectations but exceeding free cash flow targets. Despite significant headwinds in North America and Europe, including declining repairable claims and macroeconomic uncertainty, the company achieved its cash flow commitment and made progress in portfolio simplification. Management shared an optimistic outlook for 2026, citing early signs of market recovery and ongoing cost-cutting initiatives.

feed.title: 24 Merrill advisors, including #1 and #2, on FP under-40 list
feed.summary: Merrill (a Bank of America company) had 24 advisors recognized on Financial Planning's Top 40 Brokers Under 40 list for the seventh consecutive year, the most of any firm. This year's list includes Jens Pascucci ranked #1 and Christian Kelly ranked #2. The recognition highlights Merrill's talent development and commitment to its advisors.

feed.title: ISG to Study Cloudera Ecosystem Providers
feed.summary: ISG has launched a research study to evaluate Cloudera ecosystem providers that help enterprises advance their data architectures using Cloudera Data Platform. The findings will be published in a comprehensive ISG Provider Lens® report in June 2026, focusing on Data and AI Modernization and Operationalization Services. This report will assist enterprise buyers and ISG advisors in selecting appropriate partners for scalable, AI-ready data foundations.

feed.title: Needham cuts Universal Display stock price target on 2026 outlook
feed.summary: Needham has lowered its price target for Universal Display (NASDAQ:OLED) to $145 from $150, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment follows the company's 2026 outlook, which projected revenue growth of flat to 7.5%, falling short of the Street's 10% expectation. Despite the modest outlook and concerns about higher memory prices impacting consumer electronics, Universal Display demonstrated strong fundamentals with a 75% gross profit margin and a "GOOD" financial health score from InvestingPro.

feed.title: Lincoln Educational Services Corp expected to post earnings of 35 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Lincoln Educational Services Corp (LINC) is anticipated to report earnings of 35 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv earnings preview. The article provides a brief overview of the expected financial performance for the company.

feed.title: Energy Biz Tullow Oil To Buy Ghana Floating Asset For $125M
feed.summary: Tullow Oil's subsidiary has agreed to acquire a majority stake in a vessel from T.E.N. Ghana MV25 BV for $125.6 million. This acquisition is intended to support the company's operations off the Ghanaian coast.

feed.title: Kovack Advisors Inc. Has $2.33 Million Stock Holdings in Intuitive Surgical, Inc. $ISRG
feed.summary: Kovack Advisors Inc. has significantly increased its stake in Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG), boosting its holdings by 382.1% in the third quarter to 5,211 shares, now valued at approximately $2.33 million. This increase comes alongside Intuitive Surgical exceeding Q3 earnings and revenue estimates. Despite this, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading over $30 million worth of shares in the past 90 days.

feed.title: Kovack Advisors Inc. Increases Stake in Diamondback Energy, Inc. $FANG
feed.summary: Kovack Advisors Inc. significantly increased its stake in Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) by 59.0% during the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 18,449 shares valued at $2.64 million. Despite substantial insider selling, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" consensus rating for FANG with a target price of $185.90. The oil and natural gas company has a market capitalization of $50.04 billion and its stock trades at $174.72, showing healthy financial metrics.

feed.title: Kovack Advisors Inc. Decreases Stock Position in Chevron Corporation $CVX
feed.summary: Kovack Advisors Inc. reduced its stake in Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) by 30.7% in the third quarter, selling 19,289 shares and holding 43,605 shares valued at $6.77 million. This move comes as Chevron recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.78 per share, resulting in a 3.9% yield, despite an elevated payout ratio of 106.91%. Meanwhile, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading over half a million shares worth approximately $88.83 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Zacks Research Has Bearish Forecast for Clorox Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has issued a bearish forecast for Clorox's (NYSE: CLX) Q1 2027 earnings, lowering their estimate to $1.31 per share and maintaining a "Hold" rating. This comes amidst broader analyst sentiment for Clorox, with an average rating of "Reduce" and a consensus target price of $118.73, despite some firms boosting price targets. The company recently missed Q4 earnings consensus, reporting $1.39 EPS against an estimate of $1.43, and its stock was down 0.9% at market open.

feed.title: Frisch Financial Group Inc. Has $848,000 Stock Holdings in Intel Corporation $INTC
feed.summary: Frisch Financial Group Inc. reduced its stake in Intel Corporation by 46.9% in Q3, selling 22,342 shares and ending with holdings valued at approximately $848,000. Despite Intel beating Q4 EPS expectations, revenue was down year-over-year, and analysts maintain a "Reduce" consensus with a target price close to its current trading price. The article also highlights significant institutional activity and a partnership with Nvidia, which could boost sentiment but also intensify competitive dynamics.

feed.title: B of A Securities Raises Nutrien (NTR) Price Target to $71.00
feed.summary: B of A Securities analyst Matthew DeYoe raised Nutrien's (NTR) price target to $71.00 from $64.00, while maintaining a Neutral rating. This 10.94% increase reflects recent positive revisions from other analysts as well. Despite the raised price target, GuruFocus' estimated GF Value for Nutrien is $53.20, suggesting a potential downside from its current price.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Shares Gain Momentum from Dual Contract Prospects
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin is experiencing positive momentum due to two significant international developments: a potential expansion of Germany's F-35 fighter jet program and a new C-130J training contract in Australia. These developments are expected to fuel global demand for Lockheed Martin's defense products and services. The company's stock recently reached a 52-week high, reflecting investor confidence in its future order base and recurring revenue streams.

feed.title: MDU RESOURCES GROUP INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: MDU Resources Group Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing financial performance, business operations, and future outlook. The report highlights revenue growth, strategic separations of non-core businesses, and significant capital expenditure plans for system upgrades and renewable energy investments. Key challenges include inflation, supply chain disruptions, and evolving regulatory requirements, which the company is addressing through proactive management and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK Shares Acquired by ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd significantly increased its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) by 73.2% in the third quarter, making it their 25th largest holding. This move comes as institutional investors are actively adjusting their positions in MRK, while company insiders have been net sellers. Merck recently reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend, signaling solid financial health despite insider selling.

feed.title: Prakash Investment Advisors LLC Sells 5,500 Shares of Lam Research Corporation $LRCX
feed.summary: Prakash Investment Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) by 50.9% in the third quarter, selling 5,500 shares and holding 5,300 shares valued at $710,000. Other institutional investors like Gilliland Jeter Wealth Management LLC and Gold Investment Management Ltd. increased their positions in the semiconductor company. Analyst ratings for Lam Research are predominantly "Buy" or "Strong Buy", with an average target price of $244.88, reflecting a positive outlook despite some recent insider selling by a director.

feed.title: Lam Research Corporation $LRCX Stock Position Decreased by Jupiter Asset Management Ltd.
feed.summary: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. reduced its stake in Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) by 13.9% in the third quarter, selling 106,579 shares. Despite this, other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp increased their holdings in the semiconductor company. Lam Research posted strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd Takes $1 Million Position in HCA Healthcare, Inc. $HCA
feed.summary: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd acquired a new stake of 2,353 shares, valued at approximately $1.003 million, in HCA Healthcare, Inc. during the third quarter. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the company, while some insiders sold shares. Analysts currently rate HCA Healthcare as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $523.27, and the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Decreases Holdings in Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. $HII
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd reduced its stake in Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) by 8.8% in Q3, now holding 38,679 shares valued at $11.14 million. Despite the reduction, Huntington Ingalls remains a significant holding for the firm, accounting for 1.2% of its portfolio. The aerospace company recently exceeded earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $4.04 against an anticipated $3.72, and revenue of $3.48 billion, representing a 15.7% year-over-year increase.

feed.title: Mivtachim The Workers Social Insurance Fund Ltd. Under Special Management Takes Position in First Solar, Inc. $FSLR
feed.summary: Mivtachim The Workers Social Insurance Fund Ltd. Under Special Management has acquired a new stake in First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR), purchasing 29,000 shares valued at approximately $6.395 million. This acquisition makes First Solar the fund's 25th biggest position, comprising 0.9% of its total holdings. Other hedge funds, including Bornite Capital Management LP and CenterBook Partners LP, have also adjusted their positions in the solar cell manufacturer.

feed.title: Berger Montague PC Investigating Claims on Behalf of Investors in Enphase Energy, Inc. (ENPH) After Class Action Filing
feed.summary: Berger Montague PC has filed a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (ENPH) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges Enphase made misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate impacts from the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, leading to an overstated financial outlook. Following the disclosure of these issues on October 28, 2025, Enphase's stock price dropped by over 15%.

feed.title: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. Grows Stake in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
feed.summary: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. significantly increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) by 1,158.2% in the third quarter, now owning over 1.2 million shares valued at $138.78 million, making it their 10th largest holding. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Disney, which currently trades at $106.01, has a market cap of $187.80 billion, and recently reported quarterly EPS of $1.63, beating consensus estimates. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $135.80.

feed.title: Pekin Hardy Strauss Inc. Acquires 49,769 Shares of Caesars Entertainment, Inc. $CZR
feed.summary: Pekin Hardy Strauss Inc. increased its stake in Caesars Entertainment, Inc. by 23.2% in the third quarter, now owning 264,658 shares valued at $7.15 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company. Caesars Entertainment currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average price target of $33.35, despite recently missing quarterly earnings estimates.

feed.title: Pekin Hardy Strauss Inc. Takes Position in Conagra Brands $CAG
feed.summary: Pekin Hardy Strauss Inc. has acquired a new position in Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) during the third quarter, purchasing 244,402 shares valued at approximately $4.475 million. Other institutional investors also modified their holdings, with Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp. significantly increasing their stakes. Despite institutional interest, several Wall Street analysts have reduced price targets and assigned "underperform" or "sell" ratings for Conagra Brands, leading to a consensus rating of "Reduce" with a target price of $19.07.

feed.title: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. Has $186.33 Million Stock Holdings in Citigroup Inc. $C
feed.summary: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. significantly increased its stake in Citigroup Inc. by 440.5% in the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 1,835,767 shares valued at $186.33 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Citigroup, which has seen varied analyst ratings, culminating in a "Moderate Buy" consensus and a $127.25 target price. Recent insider trading shows a significant sale by Cantu Ernesto Torres, while strategic moves by Citigroup include exiting its Russian unit and focusing on higher returns.
